steps.title: Identify the clue about available transcriptions
steps.content: The key signal is that Davis had to listen repeatedly to unclear vinyl recordings to transcribe the improvised lyrics—described as “particularly labor intensive.”

steps.title: Infer what the transcription work reveals
steps.content:
For Davis to need this labor-intensive transcription work, reliable written versions of the improvised lyrics could not have already existed—if they had, the research wouldn't require her personal transcription effort.

The other choices reference information the passage doesn't support.

That confirms A is correct.
